💫 How it all started

Our Story

Every great love story has a beginning. Ours is my favourite. 🌷

👀

First time we met

That one moment I didn't know would change everything. You just walked in and suddenly the world got a little more colourful. 🌈

📅 February 17, 2025
💬

We started talking

Those conversations that went on forever. Every chat felt like finding a new favourite song — I never wanted it to end.

📅 Early 2025
💗

We became us 💖

The day I got to officially call you mine. Honestly one of the best days ever. You make everything better, Jiya.

📅 May 22, 2025 — our anniversary 🥳
🚀

Every day since

Every day is a new memory with you. More laughs, more talks, more everything. And I'm so glad it's you. 🌸

📅 Present & forever 💕
💝 From my heart

Reasons I love you

I could write a whole book, but here's a little sneak peek 🌺

😂

Your laugh is literally the most contagious thing ever. You could make a bad day feel like nothing.

🧠

You're smart and you don't even realise it. Watching you figure things out is honestly so cool.

🌙

You're the person I want to talk to at the end of every day, no matter what.

💪

You're stronger than you think — NCC, college, everything. You inspire me fr.

🫂

Just being around you (even online) makes me feel calm. You're my safe place.

✨

You're genuinely one of a kind. There's nobody else like you, Jiya, and that's my favourite thing.

💌 From Yash

A letter for you

Some things are easier to write than say out loud. So here it is. 🌷

March 2026 🌸
Dear Jiya,
I'm not the best with words sometimes, but I made you this because you deserve something that shows how much you actually mean to me. You've been there through all my stress, my grind, my random rants about code, my bad days and my okay ones — and somehow you always make things feel lighter. I don't know how you do it. You're doing so much — your studies, NCC, everything — and watching you push through it all makes me proud every single day. You don't give yourself enough credit, Jiya. I just want you to know that you're the best part of my days. Even the small things — a good morning text, a random voice note, a silly conversation — all of it matters more than you know. Thank you for being you. Thank you for choosing me. I'm not going anywhere. 💖
With all my love,
Yash 🌸
💖 🌸 ✨ 🥰
